title: Fix walker tooltip stickiness and missing NPCs

log.context: Fix walker tooltip stickiness and missing NPCs

Both fixes committed and pushed. Here's a summary:

---

**Bug 1 — Audition walker card tooltip stickiness** (`/mnt/data/hello-world/grazing.html`)

Two-part fix:

1. **`mouseleave` handler** (line ~1849): Previously, the card was only hidden if `auditionCard` was NOT active. Changed to always call `hideAuditionCard()` and resume the walker when the mouse leaves the canvas, regardless of card state.

2. **Per-frame staleness check** in the game loop: Added a check (mirroring the existing NPC too...(truncated)
